raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I was charged upfront (? ) {$6000.00} by dentist office for the bridge. But my XXXX XXXX insurance sent me a letter showing that " Amount you own dental provider '' is {$1900.00}. After my complaints to the dental office I got XXXX refunds {$820.00} and {$650.00} but I still need to get the refund with amount of {$2600.00}. Also, I am sure that the full changes upfront of work done is not possible for the patients with the Dental insurance.
